schemes.title: National Scholarship Portal (NSP)
schemes.description: Central platform hosting 650+ scholarships for students from school to university.

schemes.title: Post-Matric Scholarship for SC/ST/OBC
schemes.description: Financial aid for higher education of disadvantaged groups.

schemes.description: Support for girl students pursuing technical education.

schemes.title: AICTE Saksham Scholarship
